achievements.description: GDCU-8928 IUJ Banners completed by Jessica Dordevic (09:30 BST). Two banners delivered: (1) completing the additional profile page earns chips, (2) a user recently won an iPhone on the spinning wheel. Standard sizing for IUJ Rewards Page and Home Page use.

GDCU-8947 Cosmo Cash Machine Images completed by Ciara Carroll (10:54 BST). Updated article image, hero image, fonts, coming soon images, and email images for the UK giveaways Cosmo Cash Machine campaign. Jackpot £5,000 draw with prizes of £1,000, £500, £250 on the wheel.

GDCU-8956 Image Graphic project assistant [Claude Chat] completed and launched by Ciara Carroll (15:25 BST). Logo generator tool added to the GDC Claude design system. A Claude project trained on 6HPC image banners is now available for all editors who lack ChatGPT access. Announced to the team in #gdc-product-design-pod with documentation link.

Sprint release day: 14 tickets went live as planned. High-priority releases included GDCU-8842 (Integrate Genesis Content Layouts), GDCU-8900, GDCU-8861, GDCU-8865, GDCU-8849. BAU releases: GDCU-8895, 7363, 8611, 8854, 8912, 8877, 8834, 8929, 8931. QA verified all post-release with no critical issues reported.
Genesis Brands Carousel component released to production today (Thursday) as pre-announced by Gabriel Cornoiu on 5 May.

GDCU-8847 Display rev share operator list to VIP users (Nebojsa Stanic) progressed to In QA at 15:17 BST. VIP threshold set at level 2+, using AdTech personalisation API with D1 database fallback. UK operator list at elements.kaxmedia.net.
GDCU-8846 Cosmo Spins Spring Ad Campaign formally cancelled today (14:55 BST). Long-running carry-forward item cleared from the backlog — creative direction was never finalised.

GDCU-8874 Page Bloat SEO ticket (Harden Thomas Wallace, HIGH) progressed to In Product at 14:30 BST. Comprehensive audit: CookieYes lazy render (−432 KB, −18,900 DOM nodes across all 24 markets), SSR operator list reduction (−400–1,212 KB per listing page), VWO async load (−379 KB UK), inline script cleanup. Combined estimated saving on /uk/online-casinos: −58% (3,789 KB → ~1,600 KB).

Standard.co.uk partnership confirmed at the Mid-Week Catchup (6 May). New affiliate agreement with The Standard (Indy group). Tech/product setup kicking off soon: codebase integration, AdTech dashboard, and design team involvement for offers UI.
CC Brand Meeting (7 May): Claude design system updated by Bruno and confirmed ready for use. Team is exploring creating the next campaign banner using Claude Design.

Ciara Carroll's Claude Design guidelines published across #gdc-pod and #core-product. Covers what Claude Design is, GDC team etiquette, the 3,000-component design system, dos and don'ts, and Canva integration. GDCU-8893 Gambling.com Design System cleared from the In Product queue.

meeting_summaries.title: Mid-Week Catchup
meeting_summaries.summary: Mike attended alongside Ciara Carroll, Chloe Christie, Gabriel Cornoiu, Eoin McCarthy, Shane McGrath, Shalini Kumar, and Joshua Smith. Two main topic owners: Gabriel Cornoiu (strategic/delivery) and Chloe Christie (release/BAU). Meeting confirmed today's release plan and surfaced a significant new partnership with The Standard.
decisions: Standard.co.uk (Indy group) new affiliate partnership confirmed. Eoin McCarthy to create tickets for codebase setup and AdTech dashboard. Design team and matrix involvement expected for offers UI.
Bloomreach push notifications ticket deferred to next sprint.
Kelvin to spend Thursday and Friday on concept/prototype work for Dean and Colin. Canada French new oplist may slip to next week — accepted.
Links by Country shortcode for GX slot review pages: Eoin and Gabriel to brainstorm a solution. Michael Butlin to provide varied anchor text spreadsheet.
Two CWV tickets (GDCU-8874 and GDCU-8925) confirmed safe to run concurrently.
Alberta regulation ticket (GDCU-8946) confirmed in place.
Today's (7 May) release plan confirmed: Genesis release before GDC; 9 BAU + 5 High Priority tickets.
action_items_from_meeting: Eoin McCarthy: Create tickets for Standard.co.uk codebase setup and AdTech dashboard.
Gabriel Cornoiu / Eoin McCarthy: Brainstorm GX slot review Links by Country shortcode solution.
Michael Butlin: Provide spreadsheet of varied anchor texts for GX slot review links.
Mike Pett: Note Standard.co.uk partnership — design team involvement likely needed for offers UI.

meeting_summaries.title: CC Brand Meeting (Casino Core)
meeting_summaries.summary: Regular Casino Core brand meeting. Agenda updated with a May 7 entry confirming the Claude design system (updated by Bruno) is now ready for use. Team exploring creating the next campaign banner using Claude Design. Mike is a stakeholder on Cosmo Spins-related creative but was not listed as a direct attendee.
decisions: Claude design system (updated by Bruno) confirmed ready for team use.
Team to attempt next campaign banner creation using Claude Design.
action_items_from_meeting: Casino Core team (Colm Phelan): Attempt next campaign banner creation using the updated Claude Design system.

action_points.action: Review and sign off GDCU-8874 Page Bloat SEO (Harden Thomas Wallace, HIGH priority). Landed In Product today at 14:30 BST. Four independent fixes: CookieYes lazy render (−432 KB, −18,900 DOM nodes, all 24 markets), SSR operator list reduction (−400–1,212 KB per listing page), VWO async load (−379 KB UK pages), inline script cleanup. Combined estimated reduction on /uk/online-casinos: −58%. High SEO and CWV impact. Stakeholders: Chloe Christie, Joshua Smith, Gabriel Cornoiu, Dan Smullen.

Review and sign off GDCU-8806 Implement In-App Age Gate 18+ Verification (Carlos Blauth, Medium). In Product since 6 May. App store compliance — Apple Guideline 5.3 and Google Play require in-app age gating for gambling-adjacent apps. Gate must appear on first launch before any content. Options: DoB picker or yes/no confirmation. Gate stored locally, shown only once. Under-18 users blocked entirely. iOS and Android.

Review and sign off GDCU-8948 Update Ratio of Prize Boxes — 5th Box for Cosmo Spins (Jessica Dordevic, Medium). In Product since 09:40 BST today. Marketing wants a 5th prize box (£250 Cash Prize) added to the Cosmo Spins landing page. Jessica to share the best aspect ratio. Boxes are HTML snippets. Stakeholders: Shaun Cronin, Ciara Carroll, Miguel Migneco.

Follow up on Standard.co.uk partnership with Gabriel Cornoiu and Eoin McCarthy. Eoin is creating setup tickets. Design team involvement is expected for offers UI — confirm whether a design brief or stakeholder kickoff is needed from Mike. Consider sprint capacity implications.

Respond in #gdc-pod to Chloe Christie's question (13:49 BST today): duplicate payment methods showing on Icelandic EN brand reviews (gambling.com/is/en/spinlander). Likely language-based content pulling in duplicates. Confirm dev ticket vs editorial fix.

Respond in #gdc-pod to Chloe Christie's question (09:54 BST today): can the h2 tag be removed from the welcome message on the sign-up modal? SEO impact flagged. Chloe suggests applying across all geos. Confirm whether this is editorial or needs a dev ticket.

GDCU-8906 Review Claude Generated Tables on NL Casino Strategy Page (Jessica Dordevic, Cross-Functional, To Do). Created today. NL editors added Claude-generated HTML tables to a strategy page — needs dev review (code/performance) and UX review (brand guidelines). Stakeholders: Trystan Michielsen, Diana Thurmann, Ciara Carroll, Eoin McCarthy, Miguel Migneco. Confirm Jessica has a clear brief before she starts.
Check in with Vic Dadson — she was expected back from sick leave on Tuesday 5 May. Confirm she has returned and re-engage on data engineering options discussion that was flagged before her leave.

CARRY FORWARD — Gabriel Cornoiu stakeholder intake questions still outstanding (last message 2026-04-23): (1) should there be an 'Other' option in the offer ordering dropdown? (2) does 'new ordering structure required' mean a new OpList? No evidence of resolution.

CARRY FORWARD — Provide Chloe Christie with Confluence docs or prototypes for upcoming roadmap items (requested in #6amigos on 21 April) so she can start getting placeholder tickets in place before next sprint planning.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8903 Sports Quiz Hub UX pre-req ticket still not created. Ticket states the UX design handoff must be completed and approved before dev work can be actioned. Create or formally descope before next sprint planning.
Monitor GDCU-8847 VIP Rev Share Operator List (Nebojsa Stanic) — In QA as of 15:17 BST today. No action needed unless QA raises a blocker.

calendar._note: Microsoft 365 authentication not completed — OAuth flow initiated but callback URL not received. No Outlook calendar data available for Friday 08/05/2026. No Confluence agenda pages found for May 8 that are relevant to Mike's team. To enable calendar access, complete the OAuth flow and paste the localhost callback URL into the session. Next working day is Friday 08/05/2026.

_meta.confluence_note: 25 items modified today across multiple spaces. Key GDCU-relevant updates: CC Brand Meeting Agenda (Claude design system confirmed ready), Joshua Smith attachments on GDCU space page 6608828275 (likely ticket evidence), Ciara Carroll attachment on 6HPC Banner Creation guide (GDCU-8956 completion evidence).
_meta.morning_report_gap_note: Available morning report is dated 30/04/2026 and afternoon report 28/04/2026 — both are one week prior to today. Many items from those reports have since been resolved (GDCU-8893 Design System cleared, Sprint 169 release completed, GDCU-8801 CA/FR Oplist cleared). Action points above reflect current live state only.
_meta.vic_dadson_note: Expected back from sick leave Tuesday 5 May. No Slack activity visible but return date has passed. Confirm return and re-engage.
